creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 259119
Big patches list

Compared the list of patches applied to the Debian version:
https://launchpad.net/ubuntu/+archive/primary/+sourcefiles/ipmitool/1.8.19-7.1/ipmitool_1.8.19-7.1.debian.tar.xz

And collect some of them too to render this ipmitool 1.8.19 usable on FreeBSD.
